When the quality of the products changes , the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections  or sub-sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

3.0 31/07/2023 All 
[EIS Nov 2023: IBI-V7 version]  
New reanalysis. Temporal coverage from 
01/01/1993 to 30/12/2022. 
Update of the MFWAM model code. 
Horizontal resolution increased from 
1/20 to 1/36°. New variables on the 
highest wave. New climatological 
dataset. Verification done in 2018-2021 
period. 
Stefania Ciliberti 
Cristina Toledano  
Alice Daphinet  
Lotfi Aouf  
Marcos G. Sotillo 
Marcos G. 
Sotillo 
3.1 31/07/2024 
All (but 
Section 
VI) 
[EIS Nov 2024: IBI-V7 version]  
Timeseries extension. Temporal 
extension from 01/01/1980 to 
31/12/1992 and from 01/01/2023 to 
31/12/2023. 
Analysis of the IBI-WAV MY skills for the 
1993-2022 period. 
Breogan Gomez  
Lotfi Aouf  
Alice Dalphinet  
Axel Alonso 
Stefania Ciliberti 
Sylvain 
Cailleau, 
Marcos G. 
Sotillo

VI

31/12/2023 with new reprocessed time 
series. Merged rean-interim datasets.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for the IBI_MULTIYEAR_WAV_005_006 product, detailing changes and updates to the wave hindcast model in the Atlantic Iberian-Biscay-Irish region from various contributors over multiple years.
